loan_contract_no.text: เลขสัญญาเงินกู้

ref_own_no.text: ผู้ค้ำประกัน

op_date.text: วันที่เปลี่ยนค้ำ

combo.loan_contract_no_combo: select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no as item_code ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no as item_desc from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = {0} and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = 'สช' order by begining_of_contract desc

root.sql: select tab.* from ( with data_coll as ( select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no) as memname ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount) as loan_approve_amount_thai ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount ) as loan_request_amount_thai ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'sd') as begin_of_day ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'Month') as begin_of_month ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'yyyy') as begin_of_year ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(to_date('!op_date!','dd/mm/yyyy'),'sd') as op_of_day ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(to_date('!op_date!','dd/mm/yyyy'),'Month') as op_of_month ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(to_date('!op_date!','dd/mm/yyyy'),'yyyy') as op_of_year from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no /*WHERE*/ and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code in ( '01','12','13') --and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'สฐ6600037' order by sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no ) select data_coll.* ,ceil( row_number() over (order by data_coll.loan_contract_no asc) / 3 ) as coll_group_no from data_coll order by data_coll.loan_contract_no asc ) tab

r_tnma_contract_by_conno_norm_coll_05_ne.sql:
select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no as ref_own_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no as loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description as collateral_description ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_position_name( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) as position ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no as member_group_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no) as group_name
--ที่อยู่ปัจจุบัน ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 6 ) as address_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 8 ) as moo ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 7 ) as mooban ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 10 ) as soi ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 9 ) as road ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 11 ) as tambol ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 12 ) as district ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 13 ) as province ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 14 ) as postcode ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, '0' , 15 ) as telephone
,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.province_code , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.district_code ) as group_district ,substr(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ),1,3) as age ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no as collateral_no
from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr
where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no and sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.member_group_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code in('01') and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = {0} and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {1} /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'ผ6800001'
union
select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no as ref_own_no ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no as loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description as collateral_description ,'' as position ,'' as member_group_no ,'' as group_name
--ที่อยู่ปัจจุบัน ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.address_no as address_no ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.moo as moo ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.moo_ban as mooban ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.soi as soi ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.road as road ,pka_com_function.fp_get_sub_district_name(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.tambol) as tambol ,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.province_code,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.district_code) as district ,pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.province_code) as province ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.postcode as postcode ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.telephone as telephone
,'' as group_district ,'' as age ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no as collateral_no
from sc_lon_m_contract ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll
where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code in( '12','13') and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = {0} and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {1} /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'ผ6800001'
